reasoning: The market currently prices this at 0.7%. While 'Avatar: Fire and Ash' (Avatar 3) may have a chance at a Best Picture nomination (given the first two films were nominated), the Academy almost never awards Best Picture to massive sci-fi blockbuster sequels. The only loosely comparable exception was 'The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King', but that was a critically acclaimed fantasy trilogy finale. Given the historical reluctance of the Academy to vote for CGI-heavy sci-fi epics in the top category, the probability of Avatar 3 actually winning Best Picture is extremely low, likely under 1%. Since the requested lowest probability is 0.02, I am predicting 0.02.
